name: linkedin-optimizer
description: Turn expert recruiter prompts into a one-command LinkedIn profile optimizer.
long_description: Upload your LinkedIn profile (PDF/DOCX export) and a few target job descriptions, and Claude runs a full optimization: an honest recruiter-style diagnostic, then rewrites of your headline, About, experience bullets, Featured section, Skills, and a 4-week content plan. The model does the rewriting; this extension does the deterministic parts: parsing your local file, counting which keywords appear across the JDs, and validating character limits and banned words.

tools.name: parse_profile
tools.description: Extract text from a local .pdf or .docx profile/resume.

tools.name: parse_jds
tools.description: Return job-description text from pasted text or a file path.

tools.name: keyword_gap
tools.description: Find keywords present in N+ JDs but missing from the profile.

tools.name: lint_headline
tools.description: Validate a headline: length, banned buzzwords, required keywords.

tools.name: lint_bullet
tools.description: Check an experience bullet has a metric and a strong opening verb.
